info.title: forge
info.description: Tool to generate typescript types from your c# project

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generate TypeScript types from C# types

options.name: --fileNameCase
options.description: File name case. Default = KebabCase. Example = kebab-case [default: KebabCase]

options.name: --fileNamePrefix
options.description: File name prefix, Default = null. Example = I

options.name: --fileNameSuffix
options.description: File name suffix, Default = null. Example = Model

options.name: --folderNameCase
options.description: Folder name case, Default = KebabCase [default: KebabCase]

options.name: --typeModel
options.description: Type or Interface. Default = Type [default: Type]

options.name: --typeNameCase
options.description: Type name case. Default = PascalCase [default: PascalCase]

options.name: --typeNamePrefix
options.description: Type name prefix. Default = null. Example = I

options.name: --typeNameSuffix
options.description: Type name suffix. Default = null. Example = Model

options.name: --propertyNameCase
options.description: Property name case. Default = CamelCase [default: CamelCase]

options.name: --nullableType
options.description: Nullable type. Default = QuestionMark. QuestionMark or Null Or Undefined [default: QuestionMark]

options.name: --generateIndexFile
options.description: Generate a index file to export all generated files. Default = true

options.name: --endLinesWithSemicolon
options.description: End lines with semicolon. Default = false

options.name: --depth
options.description: Depth. Default = -1; -1 = infinite; IncludeChildren must be true. [default: -1]

options.name: --flatten
options.description: Flatten. Default = false; If true, all files will be in the same folder.

options.name: --keepRootFolder
options.description: Keep root folder. Default = true; If false, the root folder will be removed.

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Directory of files to convert. Leave empty to use config.

arguments.name: output
arguments.description: Directory to output files to. Leave empty to use config.
